title: heliamphora arenicola
intro: Heliamphora arenicola, also known as the sand drosera, is a carnivorous plant species that belongs to the sundew family (Droseraceae) and is native to the bogs of Venezuela. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Heliamphora arenicola include its potential to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and fight infections, making it a valuable herb for wound care and skin issues. Herbal preparations of Heliamphora arenicola can be made into a topical cream or salve, allowing for easy application and absorption of its medicinal compounds.
